evals.prompt: Generate an earnings call summary for Apple, Microsoft, and Alphabet
assertions: Output is a complete standalone HTML document (doctype + </html>)
Report uses the skill's template scaffold (ecs-* element IDs present)
All 20 core template placeholders populated with non-empty content
Company chips count matches expected (3)
ecs-tbody-ratings has 3 <tr> rows (one per company)
ecs-tbody-revenue has 3 <tr> rows (one per company)
ecs-tbody-volumes has 3 <tr> rows (one per company)
ecs-tbody-prices has 3 <tr> rows (one per company)
Credit sentiment badge has a positive/negative/neutral modifier class
Report uses <strong class="subsection-title"> subheaders (>=12 across sections)
Citations block contains >= 3 source-item entries (canonical markup per skills/shared/citations/SKILL.md)
